name: licentia-stack
description: Licentia.io - Sistema estadístico de control de licencias de conducir

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:dev"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.test:coverage:all: npm run test:coverage:server && npm run test:coverage:client
